metadata.title: Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) chips - SEALSQ/WISeKey vs incumbents; the stacked-narrative microcap pattern
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (NIST CSRC, GlobeNewswire/SEALSQ/WISeKey press, StockTitan, Investing.com, MarketsandMarkets, Infineon/NXP/Thales). Vendor press flagged.
metadata.frame: The real PQC market (post NIST FIPS 203/204/205) is growing but incumbent-dominated. SEALSQ/WISeKey are speculative microcaps stacking THREE narratives - quantum + space + crypto/AI - and monetizing via equity dilution and partnership press. They also touch the digital-ID/PKI layer (WISeKey is a PKI/identity firm).

real_market.standards: NIST finalized FIPS 203 (ML-KEM), 204 (ML-DSA), 205 (SLH-DSA) on Aug 13 2024 - a real, mandated migration driver.
incumbents: Infineon (SLC27 security controller, CC-certified ML-KEM/ML-DSA, first-mover)
Thales (co-developed a standardized algorithm; Luna HSMs with FIPS 203/204/205)

companies.name: SEALSQ
facts: Stock ~$2.45, -35% YTD; reported strong liquidity (current ratio 7.38, more cash than debt) - consistent with heavy equity raising during the 2024-25 quantum mania (dilution-funded cash)
Competes against Infineon/NXP/STMicro/Thales in secure elements - a market it does not lead

companies.name: WISeKey
companies.grade: SPECULATIVE; legacy PKI/identity pivoting to quantum+space
facts: WISeSat.Space launched its 21st LEO satellite (QS7001 aboard) on SpaceX Falcon 9 Transporter-16, Mar 30 2026, Vandenberg
companies.spacex_relationship: RIDESHARE LAUNCH CUSTOMER (picosats on SpaceX Transporter missions) - NOT a strategic partnership or investment by SpaceX.

assessment: LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS for SEALSQ/WISeKey as major PQC-chip players: LOW. The PQC migration is real and incumbent-led; SEALSQ's edge is press-release velocity and narrative-stacking, not silicon market share or certification depth. The SpaceX tie is a launch-customer relationship. This is the SAME microcap pattern as the critical-minerals juniors (macro-critical-minerals.json) and the IPO compute-padding (fin-spacex-spcx.json): real macro-theme, speculative vehicle. Classification: semiconductor/quantum SUB-BUBBLE, narrative-driven, dilution-funded; tangential to the AI circular core (not part of the SCC), but a clean example of bubble-adjacent froth and of the digital-ID/PKI thread reappearing.
